claims.description: The external app validates Gorsee typed route builders or route helpers in real downstream use.
The external app validates Gorsee form actions, coercion, or field/form error handling.
The external app validates auth, cache boundaries, or protected data paths.
The external app validates deterministic plugin ordering, config validation, or plugin lifecycle behavior.
The external app validates the server application mode in downstream use.
The external app validates the fullstack application mode in downstream use.
The external app validates the frontend application mode in downstream use.
The external app validates documented Node runtime or npm-based adoption paths.
The external app validates the primary Bun runtime path outside this repository.
The external app validates documented worker-style deploy targets or worker runtime behavior.
The external app validates packaged AI workflows such as framework packets, checkpoints, bridge, MCP, or IDE sync.
The external source validates migration experience from another stack into Gorsee.

rule: validatedClaims inside external-proof outreach, pending, and accepted entries must use claim ids from this catalog
